headline: UnitedHealth Faces Breakup Bill And Lawsuit While Shares Screen As Undervalued
summary: Mark Cuban backed a bipartisan US Congress bill seeking to break up large healthcare conglomerates, with UnitedHealth Group (NYSE:UNH) explicitly cited as a target. A faith based investor group filed a lawsuit aiming to force UnitedHealth to disclose more about how its integration strategy affects patients and competition. These developments introduce fresh legislative and legal scrutiny that could affect how UnitedHealth is structured and regulated. UnitedHealth Group operates across...
